response.step_by_step_log: 1. Video analyzed to identify songs. 2. Identified 'Tokyo Shandy Rendezvous' (00:00-02:54). 3. Identified promotional snippets 'ONLY MY RAILGUN' (02:55-03:12) and '青のすみか' (03:13-03:22). 4. Identified talk/transition (03:23-03:45). 5. Identified full performance of 'ONLY MY RAILGUN' (03:46-04:56). 6. Searched for official lyrics for all songs. 7. Constructed JSON response.
response.global_summary: A promotional video for 'AZKi 8th Birthday Live', featuring a full performance of 'Tokyo Shandy Rendezvous' followed by brief promotional clips and a full performance of 'Only My Railgun'.

scenes.description: AZKi and another performer sing and dance to 'Tokyo Shandy Rendezvous' by MAISONdes.
scenes.song_title: トウキョウ・シャンディ・ランデヴ
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
電波テンポアップして絶賛感電中!
あなたにもわすれたいことかなしいこと
あるのかしらね
識らない映画なのに涙をながすのはドラマチックが足りていないからよ
そんな愚にも付かないことくだらないこと考えてばかりね
雨が上がれば愛もその横顔も誰かのものになるのでしょう
嘘っぱちのファンデーションも全部
今夜のためよ
なのに一体全体如何して何故?
不安定なカンテラ何処まで行くの
あなた一切合切放り去ってもう
冗談じゃあないわ
その時が来たって如何にもならないぜ
曖昧な本当なんてメランコリ化するだけ
あたしをさあ掻攫って今テイクオンミー
ちゃんちゃらおかしな法度ばっかで
食指がびくともしないわ
実態の無い感情放っておいたって
策略なんてありゃあせんのに何故
ああもう懲り懲りよ
あたしの喝となる気質もじっと堪えて取り繕ってはとうとう臨界点
年がら年中リップサービス鈍感カマしては辟易
どんがらがっしゃんフィールガールは涙の目にも鬼
今や頭の中のミュージックのせいであなたの話は一向に聴き取れない
少しは真当なこと言って
回り出すターンテーブル
ねえ全部忘れさせてよ
だけど一体全体如何して何故?
不安定なカンテラ消えない儘ね
あなた一口両舌食い違ってもう
冗談じゃあないわ
その時が来たって如何にもならないぜ
曖昧な本当なんてメランコリ化するだけ
あたしを今..
冗談じゃあないわ
その時が来たって如何にもならないぜ
不甲斐ないわ
感情なんてランドリーで落とすだけ
あたしと確かめ合ってイエローマジック
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Denpa, tempo up, absolutely electrified!
Is there something you want to forget, something sad, even for you?
It's because there's not enough drama, even though it's a movie I don't know
You just think about trivial, useless things
When the rain clears, your love and your side profile will belong to someone else, won't they?
All this phony foundation is for tonight
Yet, why, why, why?
How far will this unstable lantern go?
You throw it all away and leave
It's not a joke!
Even if that time comes, nothing can be done
Ambiguous truths just turn into melancholy
So, whisk me away, take on me now
It's ridiculous, with all these taboos
My appetite won't be stirred
Even if you leave those formless feelings alone
Even though there are no strategies, why?
Ah, I'm already tired of it
My temperament that acts as my stimulation, enduring and putting on a front, finally reaches the critical point
Year-round, giving lip service, playing dumb and getting fed up
The girl who is a 'feel girl' is a demon even in teary eyes
Now, because of the music in my head, I can't hear your story at all
Say something sensible for once
Spinning turntable, hey, let me forget everything
Yet, why, why, why?
How far will this unstable lantern go, it won't disappear
You speak with a forked tongue, eating your words
It's not a joke!
Even if that time comes, nothing can be done
Ambiguous truths just turn into melancholy
I'll take you now...
It's not a joke!
Even if that time comes, nothing can be done
It's pathetic
I'll just wash away these feelings in the laundry
I'll take you now, and verify it, yellow magic

scenes.description: Promotional clip featuring a snippet of 'ONLY MY RAILGUN'.
Promotional clip featuring a snippet of '青のすみか'.
Transition and intro talk before the final performance.
Performance of 'ONLY MY RAILGUN' by fripSide.

未来さえ置き去りにして
限界など知らない
意味無い!
この能力(チカラ)が光散らす
その先に遥かな想いを
歩いてきた
この道を

出来ないなら...
今ここで全てを壊せる
暗闇に堕ちる街並み
人はどこまで立ち向かえるの?
加速するその痛みから
誰かをきっと守れるよ
Looking!
The blitz loop this planet to search way.
Only my RAILGUN can shoot it.
今すぐ
身体中を
光の速さで
駆け巡った
確かな予感
掴め!
望むものなら残さず
輝ける自分らしさで
信じてるよ
あの日の誓いを
この瞳に光る涙それさえも強さになるから

少しだけ

宙(そら)に舞うコインが描く
放物線が決める運命

私の
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Release! The dream I carved into my heart
Leaving even the future behind
I don't know any limits, it's meaningless!
This power scatters light, and beyond that are distant thoughts
If I can only look back at this path I've walked
Then... I can destroy everything right here
In the streets falling into darkness, how far can people stand up?
From that accelerating pain, I can surely protect someone
Looking!
The blitz loop this planet to search way.
Only my RAILGUN can shoot it.
Right now,
With the speed of light through my body
Runs a certain premonition
Grab it! If it's what you wish for, without leaving anything behind
With your own shining self
I believe in that day's vow
Because even the tears shining in these eyes will become strength
If I stop for a moment, I won't tell lies about not being confused
By the slight sadness I feel
The parabola drawn by the coin dancing in the sky decides destiny
The answer shot out today is also mine
